## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type Of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Packaging or release
- [ ] Security or privacy

## Surface Area

- [ ] Desktop app
- [ ] Web or hosted deployment
- [ ] Frontend
- [ ] Backend/API
- [ ] Local AI/Ollama
- [ ] Packaging/build
- [ ] Documentation only

## Validation

List the checks you ran:

- [ ] `npm run build` in `frontend/`
- [ ] `python -m compileall launcher.py main.py src server`
- [ ] Manual app smoke test
- [ ] Not applicable

## Privacy And Security

- [ ] No secrets, logs, runtime data, model weights, or local state are included.
- [ ] Local-first behavior is preserved.
- [ ] Online provider behavior remains explicit and consent-based.

## Screenshots

Add screenshots or short clips for UI changes.

## Notes For Reviewers

Call out risks, limitations, or follow-up work.
